content: Rewrite SingleCarPage.jsx to fetch /api/vin/<VIN> and pass real data to children
Wire CostCalculator to /api/calculator/calculate with auto pre-fill from car price (USA pipeline)
Verify on multiple VINs (Nissan, Toyota) — both /cars/:vin (homepage flow) work with real data
Wire Estimated total price from calculator into the right info panel
Run testing_agent_v3 on the new SingleCarPage flow
